title: ObservabilitySpanSchema
description: Schema for LLM systems observability tracing spans.

span_id.description: Unique 64-bit hex identifier for the span.

trace_id.description: Unique 128-bit hex identifier for the trace context.

parent_span_id.description: Parent span identifier, or null/N/A if root span.

name.description: Name of the operation being traced.

start_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the span started.

end_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the span completed.

duration_ms.description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds.

service_name.description: Identifier of the service or component generating the span.

status.description: The execution status of the operation.

attributes.description: Custom key-value metadata tags associated with the span.
